sentiment: The layers we build are the same layers that hold us — and the clearest line is drawn by someone willing to redraw it.

stories.title: BYOMesh – New LoRa mesh radio offers 100x the bandwidth
stories.summary: Mesh networks keep rediscovering themselves — this time with better reach, and a reminder that the infrastructure we dismiss as old still has weight.

stories.title: The 'Hidden' Costs of Great Abstractions
stories.summary: Every layer that saves time also costs time. The craftsman knows which abstraction is worth its weight.

stories.title: Using "underdrawings" for accurate text and numbers
stories.summary: The sketch underneath the finished work is where honesty lives. Revision is not retreat — it is the path to clarity.
